name: oneness-ai
description: Oneness-AI — 专业 AI 影视创作平台

scripts.infra:up: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres redis minio minio-init
scripts.dev: pnpm infra:up && concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:web"
scripts.db:migrate: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @oneness/shared exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:reset: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @oneness/shared exec prisma migrate reset --force
